COMPASS LE Synoptic Porewater Nutrients 2022–2024

Fausto Machado-Silva & Roberta B. Peixoto

2026-04-02

1 Run Information

#set the run date & user name 
  run_date <- "03/06/2026"
  sample_year <- "2023"
  sample_month <- "Feb"
  user <- "Fausto Machado-Silva"
  QAQC_by <- "Fausto Machado-Silva"

#identify the files you want to read in 
  # read in as a list to accommodate multiple runs in a month
  data_files <- c("Raw Data/COMPASS_Box7_MonMon_NUTR_noPO4_385-465_Feb2023_JB.csv", 
                  "Raw Data/Redo_COMPASS_Box7_MonMon_PO4.NOx.SO4_385-465_Feb2023_JB.csv"
                  )

  data_list <- lapply(data_files, read.csv)
  data_file <- dplyr::bind_rows(data_list)

  
# Define the file path for QAQC log file - NO Need to change just check year 
  file_path <- "Raw Data/COMPASS_Box7_MonMon_Nutrients_QAQC_Std_curves_log.csv"
  final_path <- "Processed Data/COMPASS_Box7_MonMon_Nutrients.csv"

#record any notes about the run or anything other info here: 
  run_notes <- "Two run dates: (1st) NOx, NO2, NH4, SO4, (2nd) NOx, SO4 and PO4" #Add notes from QAQC
  
#Set up file path for metadata 
  #downloaded metadata csv - downloaded from Google drive as csv for this year
  Raw_Metadata = "Raw Data/COMPASS_LE_Nutrient_SampleLog.csv"
  
#Set up file path for standard curves 
  #downloaded metadata csv - downloaded from Google drive as csv for this year
  st_curve = "Raw Data/COMPASS_LE_Nutrients_St_curve_Box7_NOx_NO2_NH4_SO4.csv"

  cat(run_notes)
